script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== last outbound per per-user bot (look for replies POST-migration) ==='
for pair in "afrah:.afrah-bot" "aixa:.aixa-bot" "alejandro:.alejandro-bot" "axel:.axel-bot" "cameron:.cameron-bot" "david:.david-bot" "emily:.emily-claude-bot" "jose:.jose-bot" "lia:.lia-bot" "neil:.neil-bot" "neilc:.neil-claude-bot" "rosi:.rosi-bot" "stephanie:.stephanie-claude-bot" "zahid:.zahid-bot" "jesusr:.jesus-reyes-bot" "ashley:.ashley-bot"; do
  u="${pair%:*}"; d="${pair#*:}"
  latest=$(tail -1 "/home/$u/$d/outbound.jsonl" 2>/dev/null)
  if [ -n "$latest" ]; then
    echo "  $u: $(echo "$latest" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; o=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(o.get("ts","?"), "|", (o.get("text","") or "")[:80].replace(chr(10)," "))' 2>&1)"
  fi
done
echo '=== last error per per-user bot (any post-migration claude errors?) ==='
for pair in "afrah:.afrah-bot" "aixa:.aixa-bot" "alejandro:.alejandro-bot" "axel:.axel-bot" "cameron:.cameron-bot" "emily:.emily-claude-bot" "rosi:.rosi-bot" "stephanie:.stephanie-claude-bot"; do
  u="${pair%:*}"; d="${pair#*:}"
  err=$(tail -2 "/home/$u/$d/responder-errors.log" 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'claude|Not logged|empty reply' | tail -1)
  if [ -n "$err" ]; then echo "  $u: $err"; fi
done
echo '===END==='
